name: planning-spec-backend
description: Package utilitaire pour orchestrer les paquets backend (Langium, CLI, extension, serveur Express)

scripts.clean: pnpm --filter planning-spec-language clean && pnpm --filter planning-spec-server clean && pnpm --filter planning-spec-cli clean && pnpm --filter vscode-research-work clean
scripts.build: pnpm --filter planning-spec-language build && pnpm --filter planning-spec-server build && pnpm --filter planning-spec-cli build && pnpm --filter vscode-research-work build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter planning-spec-language test && pnpm --filter planning-spec-server test
